name: Visier
tagline: AI-powered people analytics platform for data-driven HR decisions
description: Visier is the leading people analytics platform that uses AI to turn workforce data into actionable insights. Its AI models predict attrition risk, identify compensation inequities, analyze workforce trends, and forecast future talent needs. Visier's natural language query engine lets HR leaders ask questions in plain English and get instant answers from their people data.
cons: Requires clean data for best results
